title: Corporate Restructuring
summary: Successfully advised a growing manufacturing company on regulatory compliance and business restructuring during rapid expansion.
outcome: Completed restructuring within 90 days, achieving full regulatory compliance and enabling a successful merger.

title: Contract Dispute Resolution
summary: Represented a technology company in a high-stakes commercial contract dispute with a former vendor.
outcome: Achieved favorable settlement while minimizing litigation costs by 60% compared to projected trial expenses.

title: Foreign Investment Compliance
summary: Advised an international hospitality group on FITTA compliance for their Nepal market entry.
outcome: Secured all regulatory approvals and established compliant operations within six months.
